description: Triggers for transforming raw prompts into optimized prompts using frameworks

queries.query: Optimize this prompt I'm using — it's giving me mediocre results
Transform this raw prompt into a better version using RTF framework
My prompt produces generic outputs — help me engineer a better one
Apply chain-of-thought prompting to improve this reasoning task
Write a system prompt for a customer support AI assistant
Use the RISEN framework to improve this content creation prompt
Help me write a better prompt for data extraction from legal contracts
My LLM keeps giving wrong answers — let's fix the prompt
Engineer a few-shot prompt for classifying customer feedback
Build a structured prompt template for my content generation workflow
Write me a Python function to call the OpenAI API
Fine-tune a model on my custom dataset
Explain how transformers work architecturally
Set up a RAG pipeline with vector embeddings
Create a product strategy for an AI startup
Help me write a cover letter
Debug this Python script
Create a blog post about AI trends
Set up monitoring for my ML model in production
Design a customer interview guide for product discovery
